header.title: @feugene/fint-i18n Playground
header.description: A focused sandbox for validating runtime behavior, lazy blocks, Vue integration and developer ergonomics.
header.toggleHint: Switch the active locale and observe reactive updates across the page.

basic.title: Reactive `t()` usage
basic.description: Update the name field to verify interpolation and instant locale switching.

directive.title: `v-t` and `v-t.once`
directive.description: Compare reactive text updates with the one-time directive variant.
directive.onceHint: This value intentionally does not change after a locale switch.

lazy.title: On-demand component scope
lazy.description: Mount the async auth component to load the `auth` translation block only when the UI actually needs it.

partial.title: Deep JSON block loading
partial.description: Load a nested block directly or request the full page bundle and compare the resulting data.

wildcard.title: Load siblings via `widgets.*`
wildcard.description: A single registration `widgets.*` expands into every direct child block (`widgets.alpha`, `widgets.beta`, `widgets.gamma`) and loads them in parallel.
wildcard.buttonHint: Pattern is expanded once, then reused on locale change
